chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 815 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 27-10-2022 Petitioners Hamayoon alias Soorat Ali Khan and Altaf Shah are present in person. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for the respondents-university. Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant A.G Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioners present in person as well as learned counsel appearing on behalf of the respondents-university contends that the examination of B.A, LL.B-Part-V (Five Years Program, 10th Semester) has been conducted as per schedule given on previous dates of hearing. Learned counsel for the respondents-university also files undertaking / statement, whereby result of the above said examination would be announced within three months. The undertaking / statement is taken on record. The Controller, Examination, Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur (respondent No.3) is directed to ensure that the result of aforesaid exams is announced without any delay within three months hereof without fail. The petitioners on being satisfied seek disposal of this petition in terms of above undertaking / statement. Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
